parents.subject: LU-14286 tests: reduce fallocate space sanity 150e

commit.subject: LU-0000 build: remove /usr from zfs paths
commit.message:
LU-0000 build: remove /usr from zfs paths

with --with-zfs-devel= specified so that configure checks correct
paths. e.g. ./configure --with-zfs-devel=/usr/local will check
/usr/local/usr/include/libzfs instead of /usr/local/usr/include/libzfs

Test-Parameters: forbuildonly
Change-Id: I0edb0022478ec1450d1009000742bb36c5079f8b
Signed-off-by: Alexey Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
